title: LEFT JOIN malfunctions with generated column
poc: SELECT t1.c1 IS TRUE FROM t0 LEFT JOIN t1;
SELECT * FROM t0 LEFT JOIN t1 WHERE t1.c1;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with generated column evaluates incorrectly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INTEGER NOT NULL, c1 TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER, c1 AS (c0 + 1));
SELECT t1.c1 IS TRUE FROM t0 LEFT JOIN t1 ON t0.c0 = t1.c0;
